creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

The update to 290.10 is currently delayed due to some issues with it: some 
apps, especially emacs and gnome-terminal will fail redrawing text areas 
while e.g. scrolling; x11 cursor cannot sometimes be displayed correctly. 

There is an entry at http://wiki.freebsd.org/PortsNotUpgraded.  I am 
currently working with nVidia to resolve these regressions.  As a side note, 
your distinfo diff seems incorrect.  Please do not spam GNATS with trivial 
and broken submissions; emailing the maintainer would suffice for cases like 
this one, thanks.
